g.text: Plunge straight down the access shaft.
Descend past the external equipment lock...
Hover and study the signal's pattern fir...
Rig the spare rebreather to your harness...
Leave it; travel light and fast.
Pick through the collapsed mess hall.
Pry the keycard from the dead terminal.
Search the sealed sample racks first.
Take the maintenance hatch toward the ju...
Stay to document the specimen vault.
Work the flooded passage to the junction...
Force the jammed door open hard.
Tap the trapped ceiling air pocket.
Slip through the side vent to the juncti...
Rig the rebreather and head for the junc...
Squeeze into the collapsed vent crawl.
Lose your nerve and ascend now.
Drop into the core chamber from the vent...
Back out and abort the dive.
Pull the transmitter core free now.
Switch to the rebreather and work calmly...
Abandon the signal and flee for the surf...
Trigger the failing reactor to surface i...
Stop and listen to the full message.
Begin the long ascent with the prize.
Stay to wrench the data core loose too.
Power for the surface in one push.
Ride the rebreather up in safe stages.
Claw upward on your last breath.
Let go and sink back down.
Signal your dive buddy with the rebreath...
Hand over the recovered signal core.
Climb aboard with nothing but your life.
